description: This is a test class for the LoanApplicationDraftService in a Spring Boot project. It contains unit tests that verify the behavior of the draft service, including readiness checks, submission gating, and decisioning logic. The class uses Mockito for mocking dependencies and JUnit 5 for testing annotations.

classes.name: test_loan_application_draft_service_test
classes.description: This class contains unit tests for the LoanApplicationDraftService, testing various scenarios including readiness checking and submission process, with mock dependencies.

methods.name: newService
methods.description: Creates a new instance of LoanApplicationDraftService with mocked dependencies.

methods.name: draft
methods.description: Helper method that creates a mock LoanApplicationDraft object with given parameters.

methods.name: doc
methods.description: Helper method to create a SupportingDocument instance with specified user, draft, and document type.

methods.name: readiness_readyTrue_whenComplete
methods.description: Test that verifies the readiness response is true when all required sections and documents are complete.

methods.name: readiness_readyFalse_whenMissing
methods.description: Test that verifies the readiness response is false when required sections or documents are missing.

methods.name: submit_notReady_rejected
methods.description: Test that submitting a draft that is not ready results in an IllegalArgumentException.

methods.name: submit_ready_setsSubmitted_runsDecisioning
methods.description: Test that a ready draft is submitted successfully, setting status, decision, and running decisioning logic.

methods.name: submit_canSkipDecisioning
methods.description: Test that submission can skip decisioning when runDecisioning is false, and the draft is submitted successfully.
